approvalNote: Peter rejected Captain Blackbeard as bad and asked on 2026-06-16 to look for pirate or West Country / Bristol voices. ElevenLabs search found no literal Bristol/Bristolian matches; this batch auditions UK southwest, rural British, and lighter pirate-adjacent alternatives.

ian_southwest.role: Closest ElevenLabs Voice Library match for West Country / Bristol-adjacent direction

cotswold_rural.voiceName: Cotswold - Calm, Soft and Rural British
cotswold_rural.role: Soft rural British story voice; possible gentler West Country-adjacent narrator

pirate_marshal.role: Lighter British pirate character option after Captain Blackbeard was rejected

davy_sailor.role: Friendly British sailor/story voice; nautical without full pantomime pirate

takes.speaker: storybook_narrator
takes.text: Barnaby dreamed of glory on the tide; his crew brought tape, a bucket, and their pride. The task was plain: sail out and ring the bell. The plan, however, did not age so well. Then came the show beside the dock, and gave the mayhem rhythm, rules, and clock.
takes.title: Jury Rigged Barnaby Boat - West Country Pirate Audition
